label: Lantern Indexer’s Cabin
description: Lantern Indexer’s Cabin serves as a pressure-rated bedroom tucked behind the Index Lantern’s acoustic-baffled seating bays, retaining the tavern’s black composite shell and conductor-metal trim. A narrow bunk and fold-down desk are set beneath wall inlays of transit indices, rendered here as permanent, orderly bands rather than ornament. Bulkhead seams and gasketed panels emphasize Continuum Anchorage’s modular construction, with service conduits routed in straight runs for rapid refit. Fixed-field luminance from radiant ribs filters through a shaded transom, maintaining the tavern’s controlled, unvarying gloom.
